flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tyler Junior College rose 66% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $5.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tyler Junior College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (21.7% → 27.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tyler Junior College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $2.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tyler Junior College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $4.5k).
